selected_topic: Robotic elephants draw crowds and controversy in some of India's Hindu temples
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao starring as the proud emperor of a temple courtyard filled with oversized animatronic elephant suits performing a chaotic parade. The elephants have slightly goofy, blinking digital eyes and are being ‘commanded’ by overwhelmed temple staff. Nearby, curious temple cats watch suspiciously while holding smartphones showing viral videos. In the background, an amused crowd mixes temple pilgrims, tourists, and protest signs reading “Real pachyderms only!” and “Bot or not?”.
image_prompt: Square composition, colorful dense crowded temple courtyard scene with an orange tabby cat hero (Hunk Mao) wearing a small crown and a tiny emperor cape, dramatically posing as the boss of the robotic elephant parade. Several large, cartoonish robotic elephants with blinking LED eyes and wires sticking out, controlled by flustered temple workers holding tablets. Various small cats nearby, some wearing little temple bells on collars, watching with bemused expressions and capturing videos on smartphones. Background temple facade richly decorated with traditional Indian motifs and banners with playful slogans. Scattered around are hidden tiny visual jokes like a 'PETA' protest leaflets, a curry snack stand labeled 'Ele-Phantastic Bites', a robot manual titled 'How To Ele-Spy The Crowd', and stickers on elephants with witty quotes. Include mini signs in the scene with text like 'Viral VIPs', 'No elephants harmed', and 'Battery life: Pray'. The atmosphere is playful, chaotic, and full of internet meme energy, packed with small reading labels and cute props. Hunk Mao's confident and slightly dramatic expression dominates the scene.
easter_eggs: Tablet labeled 'Animatronics 101' held by a temple worker
A cat wearing glasses reading 'Temple Tech Times'
'No real pachyderms were harmed' sticker on a robotic elephant's side
Smartphone screen showing a viral video with 99M views and a shocked emoji
Elephant foot stamped with 'Low Battery' warning
Small poster with 'PETA says: Bots > Real?'
A tiny robotic mouse chasing a real mouse in foreground
Hunk Mao’s cape has a tiny internet 'EMPEROR' badge
caption: When temples upgrade pachyderms to pixels, this emperor approves... mostly for the viral views. 🐘🤖 #HunkMaoKnows
risk_notes: Avoid any disrespect or religious misrepresentation; keep a playful and respectful tone toward cultural context. Avoid implying any real harm or political statement. Avoid real politicians or financial content.
